meta.title: The Tantric Garden — Professional Tantric Massage in Mallorca
meta.description: Tantric massage centre in Mallorca. Sutra Massage, Double Climax, Striptease Divan and Energy Deluxe with professional masseuses. By appointment only.
meta.ogTitle: The Tantric Garden — Where the skin becomes the language of the soul
meta.ogDescription: Rituals of absolute pleasure in the heart of Mallorca. Sutra Massage, Double Climax, Striptease and Energy Deluxe.

hero.title: Where the skin becomes the language of the soul.
hero.lede: More than a massage — an initiation into full presence. In the heart of the island, we have created a unique space of rest and pleasure for those seeking an experience beyond the everyday.

masajistas.title: Our Masseuses
masajistas.lede: Our specialists are not only therapists, they are certified guides in somatic and tantric arts. Selected for their high vibration and empathic listening, they hold the space so you can truly let go.
masajistas.reserveMessage: Hello, I would like to book a session with {{name}}.

martina.desc: Expert in tantric massage and deep relaxation techniques.
bio: Martina has spent more than a decade guiding people back into their bodies through conscious massage. Her work blends breath, energy and sustained touch to create a space of deep trust.
Her approach is somatic and sensorial: each session adapts to the body's natural rhythm, with no rush, until the nervous system finds its rest.
She receives at The Tantric Garden by appointment, in individual or couples format, in an intimate atmosphere cared for in every detail.

melany.desc: Expert in tantric massage and deep relaxation techniques.
bio: Melany is a tantric massage therapist trained in Eastern techniques and sensory bodywork. Her firm yet delicate hand guides those who receive her into a state of full surrender.
She offers individual sessions, four-hand massages and couples experiences, always from presence and full respect.
She works in Mallorca by appointment. Each ritual is carefully prepared: oils, aromas, music and warm light, so that the body can let go.

ela.desc: Expert in tantric massage and deep relaxation techniques.
bio: Ela brings together years of practice in tantric massage, holistic therapies and body disciplines. Her work invites you to inhabit the body from an expanded sensitivity.
She designs each session as a unique ritual: reading the body, breath, conscious touch and silence. The intention is always the same: that the body remembers its capacity for pleasure and rest.
She receives by appointment at The Tantric Garden, in individual or couples sessions, with noble materials and a sustained care of the atmosphere.

dulce-maria.desc: Expert in tantric massage and deep relaxation techniques.
bio: Dulce María brings a calm and precise approach to tantric massage. Her practice blends contemporary bodywork technique with the wisdom of conscious touch, creating an unhurried, elegant sensory journey.
Each session is shaped by listening: temperature, the rhythm of breath and shared silence set the direction. Her intention is that the body finds its own rest, without forcing anything.
She works at The Tantric Garden by appointment, in individual sessions and for couples, in an intimate atmosphere prepared with care.

ritual.title: The Ritual of Complete Presence
ritual.body: We don't offer conventional massages; we design rituals of absolute pleasure. At The Tantric Garden, every session is a sensory journey created to awaken your body and release your deepest energy. Conscious touch, the aroma of our oils and an atmosphere of total privacy come together so you can experience relaxation in its highest, most pleasurable form.

experiencias.title:
Our
experiences
experiencias.lede: Each experience is prepared with local materials, a slow rhythm and full attention placed entirely on you. Individual and couples sessions, by appointment only.

sutra.name: Lotus Ritual
sutra.desc: An intimate encounter inspired by tantric arts, where movement, connection and varied postures shape a sensory journey full of complicity and nude exploration.

doble-climax.name: Double Tide
doble-climax.desc: A two-part sensory journey that opens with a delicate water ritual, preparing the body for an intense, enveloping and deeply pleasurable experience.

striptease.name: Garden of Veils
striptease.desc: A sensual and erotic dance on the divan, where fabrics and lingerie unfold slowly like veils that open the way to desire.

energy-deluxe.name: Imperial Ritual
energy-deluxe.desc: Our most exclusive experience: a journey weaving together movement, water, veils and connection in a ritual designed to awaken every sense.

espacio.title: An intimate & quiet space
espacio.lede: A retreat cared for in every detail — warm light, aromas, music and noble materials — where every corner invites the body to release time and inhabit the present.

tiles.composicion: Massage room with mirror and tantric chair
tiles.altar: Altar with Buddha figure and candles
tiles.salaAzul: Room with blue lighting and abstract art
tiles.recepcion: Reception with mirror and courtesy furniture

cta.title: Are you ready?
cta.body: There are sensations your body has not yet discovered. At The Tantric Garden we create the privacy and the desire necessary for you to explore pleasure without limits.

footer.fine1: The Tantric Garden operates by appointment only in Mallorca, Balearic Islands. Services for adults aged 18+.
footer.fine2: © {{year}} The Tantric Garden. All rights reserved.
